text: The term of office of a commissioner of pilots coincides with the person’s term as a navigation and canal commissioner.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 62. Navigation Dist. Pilot Boards
##### § 62.022 — Term of Office

The term of office of a commissioner of pilots coincides with the person’s term as a navigation and canal commissioner.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The term of office of a commissioner of pilots coincides with the person’s term as a navigation and canal commissioner.
